````markdown
# Open3DTransportWebRTC Third-Party Assets

Static libraries specific to the WebRTC transport live here.

```
ThirdParty/
  README.md
  Lib/
    Win64/
      opus.lib
```

Add platform-specific subfolders (e.g. `Lib/Linux`) as new targets are supported and
update `Open3DTransportWebRTC.Build.cs` accordingly.
````
